responses: Hello! I'm the Student Support Assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! Ask me about admissions, exams, fees, library, hostel, or anything else related to campus support.
Goodbye! Feel free to come back if you have more questions.
Take care! Wishing you all the best with your studies.
You're welcome! Let me know if there's anything else you need.
Happy to help! Good luck!

patterns: how do I apply for admission
how to get admission in this college
responses: Admissions are usually processed online through the student portal. You'll need your previous academic transcripts, ID proof, and passport-size photographs. Check the Admissions Office page for current deadlines.
To apply for admission, visit the college admissions portal, fill in the application form, upload required documents, and pay the application fee before the deadline.

patterns: how do I check my exam timetable
responses: The exam timetable is published on the college website and student portal at least two weeks before exams begin. Your admit card can be downloaded from the same portal.
For revaluation or supplementary exam queries, please contact the Examination Cell, or check the 'Exams' section on the student portal.

patterns: how do I pay my fees
responses: Fees can be paid online via the student portal using net banking, UPI, or card payment. A downloadable receipt is generated after successful payment.
For scholarship details and eligibility, check the Financial Aid section of the portal or contact the Accounts Office.

patterns: how many books can I issue
responses: The library is open from 8 AM to 8 PM on weekdays. You can borrow up to 4 books at a time using your student ID card.
You can renew books online through the library portal before the due date to avoid late fines.
Hostel applications open along with admissions. You can apply through the student portal under 'Hostel Services' and choose your room preference.
For hostel-related complaints or room changes, contact the Warden's office or raise a ticket on the student portal.

patterns: how do I register for courses
responses: Course registration is done through the student portal at the start of each semester. Make sure to check prerequisites before registering.
You can add or drop a course within the first two weeks of the semester without academic penalty.

patterns: how do I contact my professor
responses: Faculty contact details and office hours are listed on the department page of the college website.
Your academic advisor's details are available on your student dashboard under 'My Advisor'.
Your personalized class timetable is available on the student portal under 'My Schedule'.
Check the 'Timetable' tab on the portal for your daily class and lab schedule.

patterns: I need someone to talk to
responses: I'm sorry you're feeling this way. The Student Wellness Center offers free and confidential counseling — you can book a session through the portal or walk in during working hours.
You're not alone. Please reach out to the campus counseling center, or speak with a trusted faculty member or peer support group. If it's urgent, contact campus emergency services immediately.
You can reset your password using the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page, or contact the IT Helpdesk for further assistance.
For technical issues like Wi-Fi or portal access, please raise a ticket with the IT Helpdesk through the support page.

patterns: how do I file a complaint
I want to report an issue
responses: You can file a formal grievance through the 'Grievance Redressal' section on the student portal. All complaints are handled confidentially.
For urgent or sensitive complaints, you may also contact the Grievance Redressal Cell directly via email or in person.
